title: pyrus keissleri
intro: Pyrus keissleri, also known as the Korean wild pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus keissleri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Pyrus keissleri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
